qids.subject: Data Structures
qids.prose: Suppose a circular queue of capacity elements is implemented with an array of elements. Assume that the insertion and deletion operations are carried out using and as array index variables, respectively. Initially, . The conditions to detect queue full and queue empty are: A. B. C. D.

qids.subject: Data Structures
qids.prose: Consider the following operation along with Enqueue and Dequeue operations on queues, where is a global parameter. MultiDequeue(Q){ m=k while (Q is not empty) and (m > 0) { Dequeue(Q) m=m�1 } } What is the worst case time complexity of a sequence of queue operations on an initially empty queue?

qids.subject: Data Structures
qids.prose: A queue is implemented using an array such that ENQUEUE and DEQUEUE operations are performed efficiently. Which one of the following statements is CORRECT ( refers to the number of items in the queue) ? A. Both operations can be performed in time. B. At most one operation can be performed in time bu
